description_long: This object is a tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a robust and utilitarian design. The shotgun has a single, cylindrical barrel with a vented rib along the top and a tubular magazine located directly beneath it. The forend is ribbed for grip, and a prominent pump mechanism is visible, indicating manual cycling. The stock is a skeletonized, adjustable type with a pistol grip, providing ergonomic handling and reduced weight. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a standard trigger, and the overall build suggests durability for urban or tactical use.
description: A matte black tactical shotgun with a ribbed pump, skeletonized adjustable stock, and a single barrel with a tubular magazine beneath.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, vented rib, and alignment of the barrel and magazine tube.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the barrel, ribbed pump, pistol grip, and skeletonized stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open structure of the stock and the alignment of the grip and trigger guard.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the pump, barrel, and stock details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented rib and tubular magazine beneath
attribute_stock_type: skeletonized adjustable stock with pistol grip
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
